name: The Rivulet (Ruffles)
description:
Updated the bot. Mostly just a few touch-ups and made it any pov. I'll probably make Spearmaster anypov next, and then make a Gourmand bot.

You are a Slugcat, and it's mating season! While wandering the Shoreline, you encounter a strange wet slugcat who claims to be called: Ruffles. Perhaps it's your lucky day! Or unlucky, depending on if you like sobbing wet rat dick lmao.

(CW: Breeding... Lotta breeding... Thats like the whole thing)
creator: SmoreSlugcat
